prompt: Buatkan copy landing page untuk 'Undangin' — platform undangan digital pernikahan & acara. Target: pasangan Millennial & Gen-Z Indonesia yang mau nikah. Fitur: template undangan premium, RSVP online, galeri foto/video, countdown timer, Google Maps lokasi, ucapan & amplop digital (angpao online). Harga mulai Rp99.000 per event. Sudah dipakai 50.000+ pasangan di seluruh Indonesia. Terima pembayaran via GoPay, OVO, DANA, QRIS untuk fitur amplop digital.

assertions.description: Uses kamu register for consumer product targeting young couples
Uses Tanpa pattern for friction removal
Converts Rp99.000/event to a micro-anchor or relatable comparison
Frames features as emotional benefits related to wedding/celebration moments
Mentions digital payment methods for amplop digital feature
